_README: Fictional demo input. Page numbers are 1-based PDF page numbers, not sheet numbers.
scope_note: Base bid is limited to permanent fences, gates, gate hardware, and fence/gate-specific accessories. Adjacent scopes must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
bid_decision_summary: Carry the permanent chain link fence, one double swing gate, and gate hardware shown on A1.0/A7.2 using Addendum 01's 420 LF quantity basis. Keep bollards, concrete, paving, temporary fence, silt fence, tree protection fence, electrical/access-control wiring, handrail, and guardrail out of base bid.
what_to_open_first: A1.0 Overall Site Plan for the fence run and G-1 gate
Addendum 01 for the revised 420 LF quantity basis
Section 32 31 13 for chain link fence and gate requirements
scope_items: 1 EA 24 FT double swing gate G-1
Gate posts, terminal posts, line posts, rails, fabric, latch, hinges, truss rods, panic hardware, and accessories
Three strands barbed wire where shown on A7.2
brand_or_product_mentions: No proprietary brand named in the fictional source documents
access_or_interface_notes: Gate operator/access-control alternate is not carried in base bid unless separately accepted
Electrical power, low-voltage conduit, keypad, card reader, and access-control wiring are by Division 26
not_in_base_scope: Gate operator alternate unless separately accepted
open_questions: Should the gate operator/access-control alternate be priced separately?
Confirm no decorative metal fence quantities are required in base bid.

scope_pages.title: Overall Site Plan
scope_pages.evidence: 420 LF chain link fence around maintenance yard and one 24 FT double swing gate G-1.

scope_pages.title: Fence and Gate Details
scope_pages.evidence: 8 FT high chain link fence, posts, rails, fabric, double swing gate, latch, hinges, truss rods, and barbed wire.

scope_pages.title: Addendum 01
scope_pages.evidence: Revises fence run from 400 LF to 420 LF and confirms G-1 remains one 24 FT double swing gate.

spec_pages.title: Chain Link Fences and Gates
spec_pages.evidence: Permanent chain link fences and gates include posts, rails, fabric, gate frames, latch hardware, hinges, and accessories.

excluded_or_reference_only.reason: Gate operator/access-control alternate and Division 26 wiring are not included in base bid.
Concrete, bollards, paving, temporary fence, silt fence, and tree protection fence are excluded adjacent scope.
Guardrail and handrail are review-only architectural metals scope.
Decorative metal fence section has no base-bid quantity in this fictional sample.
